title: Cross-campus collaboration leads to materials breakthrough
summary_en: Materials change shape when warmed, making them useful for wearable sensors and wound treatment.
title_cn: Cross-campus collaboration leads to materials breakthrough

title: Photo gallery: Spring commencement 2026
summary_en: The University of Missouri celebrated the many accomplishments of nearly 6,000 Tigers across three days of commencement ceremonies. See photos from the weekend's festivities.

title: A cancer-fighting breakthrough gets a boost as Mizzou automates production
summary_en: Proof-of-concept study creates a blueprint for producing prostate cancer treatment more efficiently.
title_cn: A cancer-fighting breakthrough gets a boost as Mizzou automates production
